requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — SNE Project Review and IEC 63056 / NFPA 855 Direction
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——SNE项目审查与IEC 63056 / NFPA 855方向
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——SNE項目審查與IEC 63056 / NFPA 855方向

summary.en: Chad does not provide a confirmed standalone public regulation stating that NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) or IEC 63056 is mandatory nationally. In practice, utility-scale and industrial BESS installations are commonly handled through SNE-led project approvals and facility-level inspection workflows. For international projects and EPC contracts in Chad, IEC 63056 and NFPA 855 remain the international baseline references for fire-safety installation architecture. A practical gap for Chad is climate severity: ambient temperatures above 45 °C elevate thermal-runaway risk and increase the burden on thermal management, gas detection, and suppression design.
summary.zh: 乍得尚未公开确认NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）或IEC 63056在全国范围内的强制性法规。实践中，utility-scale和工业级BESS通常由SNE主导的项目审批流程管理并接受设施级验收。对于乍得的国际项目和EPC承包，IEC 63056和NFPA 855仍是消防安全安装架构的国际基准。乍得的实际差距在于高温环境：环境温度超过45°C会提高热失控风险，增加热管理、气体检测和抑制设计负担。
summary.zht: 乍得尚未公開確認NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）或IEC 63056在全國範圍內的強制性法規。實務上，公用事業規模及工業級BESS通常由SNE主導的項目審批流程管理並接受設施級驗收。對於乍得的國際項目和EPC承包，IEC 63056和NFPA 855仍是消防安全安裝架構的國際基準。乍得的實際差距在於高溫環境：環境溫度超過45°C會提高熱失控風險，增加熱管理、氣體偵測及抑制設計負擔。

standards_or_laws: Chad SNE project approval practice for commercial and industrial energy installations
NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (international reference)
IEC 63056:2020 — Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety (international project safety baseline)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
IEC 62619:2022 — cell/module safety safety requirements for industrial application contexts

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety through domestic standards and local approval processes. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for battery cells and modules, and GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are used as framework standards for system-level testing and technical requirements. GB/T 42288-2022 sets station-level station-safety measures including detection and suppression requirements. These Chinese materials are useful for engineering review but are not automatically accepted by Chad project owners where IEC 63056 and NFPA 855-aligned design is required.
summary.zh: 中国通过国内标准和地方审批程序管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含电芯和模组消防安全条款，GB/T 36276-2023与GB/T 36558-2023用于系统级测试和技术要求框架。GB/T 42288-2022覆盖站级BESS消防防护、检测与灭火要求。中国文件有助于工程审查，但当乍得项目要求IEC 63056与NFPA 855对齐时，并不能自动替代。
summary.zht: 中國透過國內標準和地方審批程序管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含電芯和模組消防安全條款，GB/T 36276-2023與GB/T 36558-2023用於系統級測試與技術要求框架。GB/T 42288-2022涵蓋站級BESS消防防護、偵測與滅火要求。中國文件有助於工程審查，但當乍得項目要求IEC 63056與NFPA 855對齊時並不能自動替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件
GB/T 42288-2022 — 电化学储能电站安全技术规程

gap.en: Gap: project-level fire-safety approval is mandatory for industrial and utility BESS in Chad. Chinese GB-standard fire documentation is a starting point, but it is not sufficient for IEC/NFPA-aligned project acceptance. A Chad-specific gap is proof of thermal derating and thermal-management robustness at ambient temperatures commonly above 45 °C. Exporters should confirm the specific project authority and site fire-safety obligations before final design freeze.
gap.zh: 差距：工业和公用事业BESS在乍得的项目级消防安全审批是强制性门槛。中国GB标准文件是起点，但不能直接满足IEC/NFPA方向的项目验收；乍得特有差距是必须证明在常年超过45°C环境下的热降额和热管理能力。出口商应在最终设计冻结前确认具体项目主管机关与现场消防义务。
gap.zht: 差距：工業和公用事業BESS在乍得的項目級消防安全審批是強制性門檻。中國GB標準文件是起點，但不能直接滿足IEC/NFPA方向的項目驗收；乍得特有差距是必須證明在常年超過45°C環境下的熱降額和熱管理能力。出口商應在最終設計凍結前確認具體項目主管機關與現場消防義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for utility-connected and industrial BESS: project fire-safety design approval and installation inspection are expected in Chad's energy-project workflows
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese fire documentation is useful but not a direct substitute for Chad project-level fire review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Fire-safety compliance in Chad for BESS is project-driven. Use Chinese GB fire documentation as a baseline, then add IEC 63056- and NFPA 855-aligned project design evidence, with explicit heat-scenario validation above 45 °C for desert deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乍得的BESS消防安全合规以项目驱动为主。可将中国GB消防文件作为基础，再补充IEC 63056与NFPA 855对齐的项目设计证据，并增加针对高于45°C工况的沙漠环境验证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 乍得的BESS消防安全合規以項目驅動為主。可將中國GB消防文件作為基礎，再補充IEC 63056與NFPA 855對齊的項目設計證據，並增加針對高於45°C工況的沙漠環境驗證。
